reviews.review_text:
Fantastic service from start to finish. Booking of 4 cabins and 3 van sites. We where all in the same area. This made hanging out with our family and friends so easy.
We had water views which was AMAZING!

Haben 2 Nächte mit dem Van hier verbracht. Check in ist easy, man bekommt vorab per Email alle Informationen die man braucht, wenn man gebucht hat. Sanitäre Anlagen sind ok, die Küche auch, jedoch alles in freiem.
Highly recommend this Park in all ways, staff, cleanliness, fantastic location, came back early from a day at Jervis National Park to be at Huskisson as beach just as nice
Great location and price, check in on time, campsite was clean, great weekend overall!
Stayed in on-site site
At the park for 10 days in a 9m caravan at a powered site. Reception very friendly, bathrooms are very clean
Great park, toilet block could be a bit fresher.
Terrific spot to stay
The sand is really white
Great sites. Right on the beach and 5 minute walk to Main st.
Site 47 has a great view out through the trees to the bay beyond. Loads of birdlife and beautifully maintained grounds.
We had a great few days in a safari family glamping tent. It was just lovely, very clean and comfortable
Wow!  Sensational location in such a beautiful little part of the world
What an amazing place! The staff are so helpful and went out of their way to make sure our stay was one to remember. It’s definitely our favourite park. Great location, doesn’t get any better xx

The cabin we stayed in was one of the smaller ones which is perfect for a couple or even a family of four. The room was spotless on arrival and all of the provided amenities were excellent. A full size fridge/ freezer was very handy as was the microwave.||The park is located right next to the beach with only a short walk into the town and Huskisson is a really nice, friendly place to stay.|There appears to be a good number of van sites as well as cabins. We would highly recommend this park.||All in all a great weekend.

We loved our stay at Holiday Haven White Sands. The location was perfect - so close to the shops, beach, and a beautiful coastal walking path. The cabin was clean, modern, and exactly what we needed for our family. It was perfect for us and our two daughters. We didn’t use the car once the entire stay because everything was within easy walking distance, which made it so relaxing. Would definitely stay again and highly recommend to families!
We had such an amazing time thanks to the staff member Callum, who so kindly offered us help to set up our tent and helped us out for over half an hour. Thank you so much Callum!!!!

This was our second visit to Holiday Haven White Sands. This time we stayed in an ensuite site for a week in January. The site was neatly kept and the ensuite was clean.
We will be back for another visit, for sure!
Great place for family holiday
Great spot by the beach. Bathrooms were clean and well kept. Sites were a bit cramped but manageable. Would happily stay again!
Beautiful location.  Spotlessly clean and well maintained,  professionally organised.

Great location right on the beach and a short walk to the town. Clean amenities although it would be great if there was more than one sink in the camp kitchen as often had to queue (there is another by block A toilets - but that involved another walk often to find someone else there). Also having only one bin point was a bit of a pain if you are based on the other side of the park.

Reception staff SUPER FRIENDLY!!
A great place to stay. Our place was clean and well looking after. I hope to visit again.
Great location,  great drive thru site , close to beach and town , basic amenities but clean .tried to get one extra night but nothing available.

We stayed six nights in our camper trailer at Holiday Haven White Sands and absolutely loved it. The park was always super busy, but the atmosphere was great and the amenities were outstanding. They were spotless every time we used them. It’s such an ideal location too, with just a short walk to the beach and an easy stroll into Huskisson for coffee or dinner. Perfect spot for a relaxed coastal getaway.
Great location. Well maintained, friendly staff.
Highly recommended to anyone that wants to get away and relax for just the couple of hours with family and friends

We stayed in a cabin that was fresh and clean and well appointed. The park is perfectly located close to town, on the beach with lots of bush surrounds.  The overall presentation of the park was excellent and the express check-in made everything so easy.  Hard to beat this place!

Well situated campervan (with other on site accommodation as well) site right beside Huskisson beach. Quiet, good views, accessible to beach and value for money. It is an ideal site as a stopping point at Jervis Bay when on the roadtrip.

Wir waren für 2 Nächte auf diesem Campingplatz und wollten uns von da aus den weißesten Strand der Welt (Hyams Beach) ansehen. Leider wurde das aufgrund des starken Regens nicht.
Obwohl wir nicht vorab reserviert hatten haben wir einen Stellplatz "mit Meerblick" bekommen. Die 10$ mehr pro Nacht waren es allerdings leider nicht wert. Durch die Bäume konnte man das Meer erahnen.
Die Sanitären Einrichtungen waren sehr sauber! Es gab einen Wäscheraum, Außenduschen und eine Spülküche. Außerdem gab es einen kleinen Spielplatz auf dem Campingplatz, der allerdings, aufgrund des Wetters, von unseren Sohn nicht genutzt werden konnte. Ein wunderschöner Strand ist in nur wenigen Minuten fußläufig erreichbar.
Die Campingplatz-Mitspieler sind sehr freundlich! Als wir Probleme mit unserer Dachluke hatten kam einer mit einer entsprechenden Leiter vorbei.
Im Städtchen Huskisson gibt es einige Lokalitäten und auch einen Delfin-Watching-Tour-Anbieter.
Thoroughly enjoyable stay. Our cabin was in excellent condition and spotlessly clean. The park location is perfect too - overlooking the beautiful bay, and just a short walk to the town.

I’ve stayed at Holiday Haven White Sands many times over the past 20 years, and it’s still one of my favourite spots with our caravan. Right on the coast and surrounded by trees, it’s a peaceful, well-kept park in a stunning location. The beach is steps away, and the main street is an easy walk. Booking online is quick and check-in details arrive by email—super convenient. Highly recommend!

Lovely caravan park with plenty of cabins. It was clean and quiet and very close to both the beach and town. There is a lovely walking path from Holiday Haven to town that goes past a children’s playground. The price was very reasonable for our winter stay and there was plenty for the kids to do on the beach which has rock pools and sandy areas.

We stayed on one of the drive through sites. Easy to access, close to amenities. Park is clean and well kept. Amazing location, short walk to main street and right on the beach. The online check-in is a big plus for me, book online and received all my check-in details via email. So simple, would highly recommend and will definitely be back again.
Shannon, Bruce, Hayden are great people and attentive and friendly. First time visitor and definitely will be back.  Thank you for being amazing guys!
Very clean and comfortable, almost walking distance to the town. Will definitely come again.

A long time visitor to this van park. Recent change in management has seen an improvement in the park. It will continually improve and return to what we love about staying at Holiday Haven White Sands. Location perfect and close to everything. Friendly, welcoming and helpful staff.
Great location for a getaway in the off season. Stunning views, great access and well maintained facilities

Fantastic.. but whomever designed the drive through faced them south!
Got blown away and fruzed.. other than that excellent
Camping bien équipé avec bungalows et places tentes et caravanes.

What a nightmare of a stay. Group of campers constantly up till all hours of the night playing loud music,drinking, swearing and degrading talk about women. Disrespectful to everyone. There are rules regarding noise but management does nothing to enforce it. Coming here as a family with young children was a mistake.
Great caravan park, beautiful grass sites with views of the ocean. Fantastic location only 200m to beach and 900m to the town.

Fantastic location literally 5 min walk to Huskisson and 2 min to beach
Check in/out was super easy
Staff friendly
Quiet park
Cabin lovely fully equipped
Only negative bed was very uncomfortable terrible mattress
Will stay again but will bring mattress topper.
Stayed here in my van. Fabulous spot. Great staff. Didn’t rate the rooms as I was in my van. Stunning beach !
Good park close to main shops

We stayed in the amazing safari tents and it was so nice. The park itself isn’t that great. No pool, small park, no jumping pillow, or anything fun for the kids really. But the beach was amazing, the walk to town is short, and there’s bandicoots and possums knocking about. In general it was great but the cabins were not super clean.

I have a disability and needed to book a particular ensuite site. Bearing this in mind we booked 7 months ahead to secure the required site. On arrival we were given a different site which did not meet my medical needs. We lodged a compliant and asked it to be escalated to management. The silence if deafing.
We were looking forward to make ongoing bookings given the proximity to the beach and shops. Alas, as the park clearly doesn't meet its promises we can't come back.

The day after we arrived we mentioned that weeding around our site hadn’t been done for months. All we got from the staff was excuses and rude response. We are now leaving after 11 days and the weeding  and edges still haven’t been done on a premium drive through van site. The management needs to have more staff to look after sites. On a positive note it is lovely location right on the beach and close to town.
Beautiful place to visit
Great stay love Husky 😎

This is more for the crusing sailors.
White sands park is at the boat ramp in Vincentia in Jervis bay. There are a number of mooring balls about 300 meters from the shore. It was pretty calm the 4 days we were there. There are large skip bins near the ramp but the only place to get water is either the fuel station near coles or from the toilet tap.
Coles is approximately 300 metres from the beach near the ramp. The ampol service station is next door to Coles.

Not a great experience given a small site after booking for a large caravan struggled to get on site which hadn't been mowed for along time. Facilities are old but clean , location is lovely beach beautiful.  The office lady was rude and had a bad luck attitude for
$70 a night we have done alot better. I did give you the correct measurements at the time of booking my husband and daughter where there when I booked you need to be accountable and just apologise for making an error which unfortunately spoilt our holiday.
Bella spiaggia con sabbia bianca, a tratti con rocce levigate dalle maree! Ottimo per un po' di relax a due minuti dal centro di huskisson

Unfortunately the park is no longer maintained by management. The cabins are not updated, three years in a row have been dirty on check in. Missing light covers, furniture falling apart. ||Family staying in caravan also complained public toilets are filthy.
Worth the wait!

Nice soft sand, clear blue waters. Lots of tables and grass areas for picnics. Play area for kids.
Good clean amenities close by.
Great spot in the centre of town walk everywhere in minutes

We had a great stay in our camper trailer at one of the powered sites. The location is fantastic, with elevation above the bay and easy access to the beach and other beautiful swimming spots. The facilities were excellent - really nice gardens and plantings around sites, plenty of room, very clean shower block with really good water pressure. The online booking and express check in system works very well.

We had a problem with our camper right when we were about to leave and had to go into Nowra to get a part. The staff were really understanding and helpful, extending our access code to come back and pick up the camper. This was much appreciated!
Lovely location with all amenities clean and tidy. The reception provided potential local activities given the terrible weather, which was a nice touch.
Accessibility cabin was ok but bathroom difficult to use safely. Not much around to provide support. No view of water with a row of.caravans between cabin and water.

Great clean park,well maintained. We booked the safari cabin they are closer to the beach with some views. They were really clean, well maintained with everything we needed. Close to everything in town. Has a great walking track along the beach to town. Beds were confortable, beautiful peaceful park.
Actually fully booked... Clean amenities but a little bit old and small. Fees not too cheap! Over all - to recommend!
My caravan was located on a drive through ensuite site, which was very convenient, suitable which. created an enjoyable time in Huskisson.
Great location by the beach. The sites and very (very very) close together with kids riding bikes and scooters all over the place.
Park was nice, although a bit pricey. Clean amenities boom gate in and out.
Value for money. Lovely week
Enjoyable /overall

Fantastic location
The Ensuite looked brand new with really good water pressure in the shower.

The staff were very friendly and more then happy to help.

Will be staying here again

Spent 7 days here with the family and friends.
Great park very family orientated. Very clean and tidy park. Facilities are well maintained. Highly rate this park.

The park was great we had great time everyone was so nice in the park we will be back to stay again vert clean park workers very nice to chat to shops close by very nice walk to the shops and water very good location to everything cannot wait to get back
Great location, ok facilities. If you leave 2 mins after your checkout time they will charge you $20 to your credit card without notification…

Being creatures of habit we have always holidayed at the same caravan park. This time we decided to change it up after a recommendation from friends. We spent 3 nights at this park and we could have spent many more. The facilities are clean and very well kept. The management and staff are very helpful and friendly. We had a drive through site with an ensuite which was very clean. Most sites have either a concrete slab or the grass sites mostly have shade cloth pegged down. The beach is very close and it was very calm while we were there. Being inside Jervis Bay,  not a lot of swell gets in there. The Main Street is only a short distance and is an easy walk. We actually walked to Vincentia one morning which was an  easy  3.5km. If you have bikes then there are paths going South and into the Main Street. We will be back soon. Highly recommend this park.

We're staying on a powered site, perfect position with views over the water. Love our stay here. Flat walk to the shops and cafes. Went a bit further yesterday to Dent Street.  Beautiful area with  excellent walkways through the mangroves and a lovely picnic area at the Maritime Museum. Highly recommend Huskisson.
It was amazing and relaxing and the sunrise was amazing worth going there❤️

We have been coming here for many years, but unfortunately the current management are ruining the experience. Cabins are in poor order and broken fixtures remain unfixed from year to year.  BBQs are not cleaned daily anymore, when under previous management they were. Gardens are unkempt and weeds are everywhere. The customer service is very poor, they don't answer the phone, and when giving feedback about our stay we were met with nothing less than abuse .  Other residents at the time of our stay had similar experiences.  Such a shame,  for this is a great spot, but we will look elsewhere from now on
Fantastic spot highly recommend if in the area
Beautiful, calm beach. Dog on leash area.
Tidy and clean park, close to Huskisson main town
Great for families, facilities were clean. Staff were friendly and informative.

We had a good time at this park were we stayed  for 4 weeks ,we would like to do it again but  they put the prices  up 30 Dollars  a day so it seams  for people like us retired  pensioners it will be outof our reach . Shame Council  became so Greedy  people will still go but only for a few days  so they have  shot themselves in the  foot shame on them !!!!!
The accommodation here is great. There are plenty of site options available.
One of the beautiful beaches.  The day was perfect loved the crashing waves. Watching people enjoy it all.

Huskisson is one of my favourite places in all of Australia.
I was lucky enough to have booked at white sands with some backpacker friends not long after arriving in Aus 8 years ago.

Ive since been back 3 times and always opt to stay in the 'overspill' part of the park with camping pitches only. It has a side access down some stairs that makes it around a 40m walk from park to the beach at the creeks edge.

The amenities are always clean and tidy thanks to the hard work and regular routines of the cleaning staff. 3 sinks, showers and toilets in each block is enough to keep everyone happy even during peak times. The kitchen has 2 sinks and stove tops and 4 outdoor BBQs.

Other guests are predominantly quiet and respectful with the night time ambience never reaching the kind of volume that would disturb others.

Its a 15 min coastal walk to town and a stones throw from one of the best beaches the east coast has to offer!

Many campers i speak to come here for regular or annual holidays and have done for years. It just goes to show the draw this place has.

The front of house staff are always well mannered and will assist in whatever way they can. Always and absolute pleasure to deal with.

Recently stayed over the Australia day long weekend having not been away since before covid. It was all i remembered and more. I will be staying here again many times in future for sure.
Would like to tell you it's no good but if there's a Heaven on Earth it's it
Great spot great rooms.
Beautiful destination. Very conveniently located. Outstanding staff, very helpful and friendly. Amenities maintained well.

Great location near town and beaches but there are some problems. Cabin was dirty when we arrived, shelves in fridge had cracks in them (one broke and wasn't replaced), wi-fi didn't work, ceiling fan made annoying noise and front fly screen didn't open properly. Cabins probably need a spruce-up.
Awesome  place to whale watch .see the local dolphins. Enjoy the surf sun and relax
One of the most beautiful beaches i visited in Australia.

The absolute best family friendly holiday park! Now in our 2nd year here on a powered site, it’s the best week! Facilities are great, it’s clean and our sons absolutely love it! You can hear the beach at night, it’s bliss ☀️ Thank you guys! We can’t wait till our next annual Xmas/New Year trip 🫶🏻
What a beautiful holiday park.

Had a fantastic stay at Holiday Haven White Sands. Fantastic staff, clean room, had everything we needed.

Brilliant location - would probably stay at this location again due to proximity to main Husky strip.
As with all beaches on this area lovely and squeaky sand.  Rocky areas to walk and explore
A lovely place for the kids to have a swim, beautiful clear waters & white sands. We often take a day trip down to Husky just for a swim!
Great site with beautiful views over the water ,very friendly staff

We stayed in the Safari tent for 2 nights. Having previously living in the area for 20 yrs it was a huge deal to be able to show our little grandson where his dad grew up. Staying here made the adventure perfect. Had the best relaxing time. We will definitely be booking again. Thankyou to all the staff for providing us with an awesome stay. 🏝️
Very good
Amazing park, well looked after and organised
We had a powered site for our caravan,great beach ⛱️ easily accessible from the caravan park,walk/bike trail into town 👍amenities are dated but clean 👍
Drive-thru site was very convenient with our caravan. Amenities were pretty average. However, the park is in an unbeatable location.  Would happily come back and stay again.

Staff, dismissive and rude.  Cabin 1 accommodation is unsafe and in disrepair.  On arrival we noted that directly outside and below the second bedroom window, the space was being utilised as a dumping ground for old furniture stacked up, this extended around to outside the kitchen window.  One of my teenage sons attempted to access the top bunk and the entire bunk bed swayed.  This was even worse when my second teenage son sat down on the bottom bunk.  It was unsafe for 2 man size 14 and 15yr Olds.  Before heading around to the office one of the children closed the bedroom door to get changed.  He then could not get out of the room as the handle did not work from the inside.  My partner opened the door from the outside and let him out.  He then closed the door and attempted the handle, himself .  This time it came off in his hand.  Also noted in this room, was water damage and mould to the skirting boards.

I approached the concierge in the office and when I explained the situation, I was told "the kids will have to share the bottom bunk".  I explained that they were teenage boys and her response was "oh well".  I was then told that no one could look at the door until the following day then walked away from me.  I immediately sent a detailed email outlining the issues along with photos.  I was again given a dismissive response, told that the bed was safe and that we would just have to leave the bedroom door open.  At no point did anyone offer to even come to the cabin and view our concerns, nor offer an apology for the inconvenience of having a child sleep on the sofa and having to leave doors open, let alone have a view of their private waste disposal outside the windows.  We decided to check out a day early due to the poor conditions.

Although the location is fabulous, the park management and Cabin 1 was disgraceful.  We stay in basic cabin accommodation often and have never experienced anything like this.
Well worth a visit

Well kept facility's ,Friendly staff.
Enjoyed our stay.

Incredibly lovely staff! Had some issues with construction noise, and when I mentioned it in a passing comment they immediately moved me to the other side of the park with a free upgrade. They were also incredibly helpful when I decided to extend my trip last minute. A beautiful area, with a beautiful beach right on your doorstep. Clean amenities and an easy 10 minute walk to the main town area.

Absolutely laughing at the review before me. "We knowingly showed up late and they wouldn't reopen for us - 1 star". Some people are so entitled

No idea what this park is like, the lady sitting at the reception desk today wouldn’t let us in because she was closed. Yes we were there 10 min after closing time because we didn’t realize they shut dead on 5pm. She rudely told us to go away, waving her hand and pointing to the exit. We ended up at Jervis Bay Park, friendly staff, lovely location, thanks for shooing us away love and being so unhelpful, you did us a huge favour 😁
Very nice here to relax on the sand or just sit on the grass the serenity is amazing definitely worth the drive from Wollongong

Located along some of the best beaches we have ever seen. The park ammenities are clean but very dated, especially the showers. Only bins are at the front of the park which is a bit of a pain.

There are lots of drive through sites with and without ensuites but very bland surroundings. We had a site along the back fence right on the walking path. Taking you a short walk into town or on to the beach.

Bring your bikes as there are great shared trails. The township has everything you need across all categories.

We will be back to Huski for sure, but will probably try their beach park a which is right at beach level
Love Huskisson great place to visit stayed in the safari tent few day had a blast beaches are amazing
The second decade of terror is about to begin
Drive thru caravan site.   Easy access to the lovely white sands beach. Short lovely nature walk  to shops and restaurants.
It’s ok but unfortunately no camp kitchen…
Great location, Manager Rob is a down to earth bloke
We won’t be back!!!
Great place for families close to beach and the main street
